42%

Visibility problems hide before the phone rings

If your local presence is weaker than the companies around you, the missed opportunity starts before your CSR even has a chance to book the call.

$211

Buying more leads is an expensive way to stay confused

Before you spend more on PPC or LSAs, it helps to know whether your local market position is the actual leak.

200+

Trust gaps stack up fast in local HVAC markets

The top companies often combine review volume, profile strength, and visible activity in a way that quietly widens the gap every month.

How it works

We scan your market, find where competitors are winning, and show you how to close the gap.

This should feel like analysis, not software onboarding. The goal is simple: give you a fast, credible answer before another month disappears into guesswork.

01

We scan your top competitors

We look at the companies homeowners actually see around your city for the keyword that matters most to your service business.

Maps rankings + visible trust signals
02

We find exactly where they’re winning

Review velocity, profile completeness, local visibility, and visible activity all get compared so the gap stops feeling abstract.

Gap analysis, not generic SEO advice
03

We show you how to close the gap

You get a report that explains what is happening, what it may be costing, and what deserves attention first if you want more calls.

Delivered in 48 hours

When the gap is visible, the problem gets harder to ignore.

The report is meant to create that moment. You should be able to look at one page and immediately understand why other companies are getting the call first.

  • Your exact ranking position vs the companies outranking you
  • The local players stealing trust and visibility in your city
  • The likely call opportunity you are missing while they stay ahead
  • The short list of fixes most likely to move the needle first
Estimated monthly call gap in this example +38 calls/mo

Local market snapshot

Apex Comfort Systems

Dallas, TX · “AC repair Dallas” · Analyzed March 2026

Cool Breeze HVAC 4.9 847 #1
Texas Air Experts 4.8 612 #2
One Hour Heating 4.7 439 #3
Apex Comfort ← You 4.3 91 #4
Air Comfort Solutions 4.6 318 #5
Estimated monthly calls going to top competitors +38 calls/mo gap
What you get

Outcome-focused deliverables, not a pile of observations.

The report should help you decide what matters next. Every section exists to make the opportunity and the fix path more obvious.

01

Know exactly who is stealing your calls

See the local companies homeowners are most likely choosing over you, not a random list of competitors that do not matter.

02

See your real ranking position vs competitors

Understand where you actually sit in the map pack for the service keyword that matters most in your city.

03

Identify missed revenue instantly

Translate a local visibility problem into a business number that is easier to act on and harder to dismiss.

04

Know what to fix first

Get ranked priorities based on likely impact, so you do not burn another month spreading effort across the wrong things.
